Employee.GetByDepartmentId: SELECT * FROM Employee WHERE DepartmentID=@DepartmentID AND IsDeleted = FALSE
Employee.GetByPositionId: SELECT * FROM Employee WHERE PositionID=@PositionID AND IsDeleted = FALSE
Filter.SalaryComposition: SELECT * FROM Pa_Salary_Composition WHERE SalaryCompositionId IN (SELECT SalaryCompositionId FROM Pa_Composition_Organization WHERE OrganizationId IN (SELECT OrganizationId FROM Pa_Organization WHERE OrganizationName = @OrganizationName))
